description: Evaluation cases for FAIR4RS publication readiness skill

evals.prompt: I'm preparing my Python ABM for publication on Zenodo. What metadata and files do I need?
evals.expected_output: FAIR4RS publication checklist, codemeta.json artifact, CITATION.cff generated from codemeta.json, DMP and SMP guidance, metadata requirements, Zenodo deposit workflow

evals.prompt: Create a timeline for my project
evals.expected_output: Skill does not activate; not related to model publication

evals.prompt: I have a model on GitHub and I want to make it citable. Generate CITATION.cff.
evals.expected_output: codemeta.json plus CITATION.cff content in RFC 8949 format with author, license, repository URL
success_criteria: codemeta.json includes @context, @type, name, version, codeRepository, license, and author metadata
CITATION.cff includes cff-version, title, authors, license, repository-code
CITATION.cff values are consistent with codemeta.json fields
Output renders correctly on GitHub as a cite button

evals.prompt: Prepare both a data management plan and a software management plan for my published model
evals.expected_output: DMP plus EVERSE-aligned SMP addressing lifecycle governance, QA, releases, maintenance, and archival
success_criteria: DMP covers all FAIR4RS pillars (Findability, Accessibility, Interoperability, Reusability)
DMP includes specific Zenodo/OSF/institutional repository recommendations
SMP includes software lifecycle coverage (collaboration/licensing, design/implementation, testing/QA, deployment, versioning/releases)
SMP is framed as a living document with roles, maintenance expectations, and contingency planning

evals.prompt: Write a README for my code
evals.expected_output: Skill does not activate; README generation is a generic writing task

evals.prompt: Use EVERSE guidance to draft a software management plan for my reusable research software package.
evals.expected_output: Software Management Plan structured with lifecycle sections and software-type-aware priorities
success_criteria: SMP includes explicit scope and software type classification
SMP defines stakeholder roles and governance responsibilities
SMP includes CI/testing/code review and release/deprecation practices
SMP includes discoverability and preservation actions (e.g., Zenodo, Software Heritage)

evals.prompt: Create a codemeta.json for my model repository and then derive a matching CITATION.cff.
evals.expected_output: A valid codemeta.json artifact and a synchronized CITATION.cff derived from it
success_criteria: codemeta.json uses CodeMeta JSON-LD context and SoftwareSourceCode type
codemeta.json includes core project metadata and at least one author
CITATION.cff can be traced back to codemeta.json values without conflicts
